summary: Instagram now allow users to edit comments within 15 minutes of posting. Users can make unlimited edits during this time, but only the text portion can be changed, and an edited label will be visible to others.

title: India accounts for 15% of GitHub’s global user base, with 27 million developers on the platform
summary: Kyle Daigle, CEO of GitHub, said in a post on X that India now accounts for one in seven new developers globally. India now makes up over 15% of GitHub’s global user base of over 180 million developers.
